## 📢 Overview
Initial release of PipeDream

## ✨ Features
- `Get-DataverseAuthToken`: Get authentication token for Dataverse
  ```powershell
  # Get authentication token
  $token = Get-DataverseAuthToken `
      -TenantId "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" `
      -EnvironmentUrl "https://ORG.crm.dynamics.com" `
      -ClientId "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" `
      -ClientSecret "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

  # AccessToken : eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOi...
  # TokenType   : Bearer
  # ExpiresIn   : 3599
  # ExpiresAt   : 2025-03-02T02:17:16Z
  # Resource    : https://ORG.crm.dynamics.com
  ```

## 🐛 Bugs
There are no bugs. Just saying.
